column1: 春から夏にかけて、この地域では雨が多い。
column2: はるからなつにかけて、このちいきではあめがおおい。
column3: From spring through summer, this area gets a lot of rain.
column4: にかけて (through / over / from ~ to ~)
column5: Period/Place A + から + Period/Place B + にかけて
column6: expressing a range of time or place over which something continues or occurs; 'from A through B'
column8: にかけて = extended range through (often gradual); から～まで = from ~ to ~ (clear endpoints); わたって = spanning a range; ごろ = around (approximate time)
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:にかけて source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top10k complexity:standard
